title: March 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 12''' is the 71st day of the year (72nd in leap years). There are 294 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Tony Waye]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Frank Welker]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[Gambler's World]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*1979 – ''[[The Star Wars Question and Answer Book About Space]]'' published.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 107|''Star Wars Weekly'' 107]] published.
*[[1984]] – ''[[How the Ewoks Saved the Trees: An Old Ewok Legend]]'' published.
*[[1985]] – ''[[The Ewoks and the Lost Children]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' limited-edition hardcover collection released.
*1996 – [[Heir to the Empire 5|''Heir to the Empire'' 5]] published.
*1996 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 15]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 21|''Legacy'' (2006) 21]] published.
*2008 – [[Rebellion 12|''Rebellion'' 12]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Ballad of Cham Syndulla]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 140|''Star Wars Insider'' 140]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 15|''Star Wars'' (2013) 15]] published.
*2014 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 10]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures, Volume 5: Mechanical Mayhem]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars by Jason Aaron Omnibus]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)|''I, Jedi'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2024 – [[Star Wars Insider 224|''Star Wars Insider'' 224]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Legacy of Vader 2|''Legacy of Vader'' 2]] published.
*2025 – "[[RJ Makes a Speedy Delivery]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
*[[2026]] – [[Poe and the Missing Ship (audiobook)|''Poe and the Missing Ship'' audiobook]] to be released.
<noinclude>
